title: Summary: Turn 3
content: Pepe: background monitoring thread in AgentTaskRunner, triggers at context utilization >0.85; summarizes each conversation-turn memory via LLM, vectorizes summaries locally (character 3-gram hash to 256d), filters with cosine >0.3 against current context, writes filtered IDs to session.selectedMemoryIds. Uses cooldown 30s, min 3 memories; local vectorization, optional dependency, reuses ProviderAdapter.
